generations.prompt:
Edit the original image to create a strong pose variation. Increase head tilt significantly. Lean the face slightly closer toward the camera. Angle the head downward and sideways as if filmed from a tilted handheld selfie. Preserve identity, face structure, hairstyle, and outfit. Background and lighting may remain simple.

Generate a smooth handheld selfie transition from image 1 to image 2. Preserve identity, face structure, hairstyle, and outfit. The movement should emphasize a stronger head tilt, face leaning closer to camera, and a downward sideways tilted selfie angle. Natural realistic motion, stable face, no identity drift.
Same girl as reference image, identical face and features. Follow the movement and facial expressions in the video precisely. Smooth realistic animation, natural physics, stable camera.
have the woman in image 1 wearing the clothing from reference image 2. Preserve facial structure, skin texture, lighting and body proportions.

workflowMetadata.note: KIE docs currently expose wan/2-7-image for Wan image editing; wan-2.6-image-edit was not found in current docs.

generations.prompt:
Create a photorealistic UGC image of Jade.

Use image 1 only for the character identity, face, features, skin texture, and body proportions.

Use the reference recipe JSON below for pose, composition, camera, outfit vibe, background, and lighting.

Do not copy the reference person's identity. The identity must stay as the character in image 1.

reference recipe:
{
  "composition": {
    "orientation": "vertical portrait",
    "framing": "tight upper-body to mid-thigh selfie framing with arms extending toward the camera",
    "subject_position": "centered, leaning forward into the frame",
    "crop": "top of head close to upper edge; arms partially cropped at lower left and right edges; legs cropped near upper thighs",
    "depth_of_field": "shallow-to-moderate depth of field with subject sharply emphasized and background softly minimal",
    "background_perspective": "slightly distorted close-range perspective from a wide smartphone lens, making foreground arms and upper body appear larger"
  },
  "camera": {
    "shot_type": "close selfie / UGC portrait",
    "camera_angle": "low-to-slightly-upward angle, camera positioned below face level",
    "camera_distance": "very close, arm’s-length distance",
    "lens_feel": "wide-angle smartphone lens with mild perspective distortion",
    "capture_device": "front-facing smartphone camera feel",
    "image_texture": "bright, smooth, high-exposure mobile photo with polished skin detail"
  },
  "pose": {
    "body_orientation": "body facing the camera directly",
    "torso_position": "leaning forward from the waist toward the camera",
    "head_position": "head slightly tilted back with chin subtly raised",
    "arm_position": "both arms extended forward toward the camera as if holding or stabilizing the phone",
    "hand_position": "hands out of frame or cropped, implied holding the camera",
    "leg_position": "standing with legs slightly apart, visible from shorts downward to upper thighs",
    "gaze_direction": "looking directly into the camera lens"
  },
  "facial_expression": {
    "eyes": "relaxed, half-lidded eyes with long lashes",
    "mouth": "softly pursed lips",
    "overall_expression": "confident, posed, glamorous selfie expression"
  },
  "hair": {
    "length": "long, reaching past chest",
    "color": "light to medium brown with warm highlights",
    "texture": "straight and smooth",
    "parting": "center part",
    "placement": "hair falls over both shoulders, with a large section draped over the left side of the chest",
    "hair_accessories": []
  },
  "clothing": {
    "top": {
      "type": "tank crop top",
      "color": "white",
      "fit": "tight, body-hugging",
      "details": "scoop neckline, sleeveless, cropped above the waist"
    },
    "outerwear": {
      "type": "none",
      "color": "",
      "fit": "",
      "details": ""
    },
    "bottom": {
      "type": "denim shorts",
      "color": "light blue wash",
      "fit": "high-waisted, fitted",
      "details": "frayed raw hem, visible front pockets, casual distressed summer style"
    },
    "footwear": {
      "type": null,
      "color": null,
      "fit": null,
      "details": null
    }
  },
  "accessories": {
    "jewelry": [
      "delicate thin necklace with small horizontal pendant"
    ],
    "face_accessories": [],
    "handheld_items": [
      "smartphone implied by selfie perspective, not visible"
    ],
    "other": []
  },
  "environment": {
    "location_type": "indoor residential or minimal studio-like room",
    "setting": "bright clean interior with plain light-colored walls",
    "background_elements": [
      "white or cream wall",
      "soft curtain or bright window area on the right",
      "minimal architectural edge or wall corner on the left"
    ],
    "ground_surface": "not visible",
    "weather": "not visible",
    "time_of_day": "daytime suggested by strong natural brightness",
    "props": []
  },
  "lighting": {
    "main_light_source": "strong natural daylight from the right/front-right side",
    "secondary_light_sources": [
      "ambient white room bounce light"
    ],
    "direction": "front-right and slightly above, washing across face and body",
    "intensity": "very bright, high-key exposure",
    "color_temperature": "neutral to warm daylight",
    "shadow_quality": "soft, minimal shadows due to overexposure and bright bounce",
    "reflections": "subtle highlights on hair, skin, and necklace pendant"
  },
  "recreation_notes": {
    "must_preserve": [
      "vertical smartphone selfie composition",
      "low slightly upward angle",
      "subject leaning forward with both arms extended toward camera",
      "direct gaze with softly pursed lips",
      "white fitted cropped tank top",
      "light blue frayed denim shorts",
      "long straight center-parted hair",
      "bright high-key indoor daylight",
      "minimal pale background"
    ],
    "can_change": [
      "person identity and facial features",
      "hair shade within natural brown tones",
      "exact necklace pendant shape",
      "room layout details",
      "minor crop variations"
    ],
    "avoid": [
      "identifying the original person",
      "visible logos or branded items",
      "overly dark or moody lighting",
      "busy background",
      "full-body distant framing",
      "dramatic facial expression instead of relaxed posed selfie"
    ]
  }
}

hair.color: light to medium brown with warm highlights

lighting.direction: front-right and slightly above, washing across face and body

lighting.reflections: subtle highlights on hair, skin, and necklace pendant

direct gaze with softly pursed lips

generations.prompt:
Create a photorealistic UGC image of Jade.

Use image 1 only for the character identity, face, features, skin texture, and body proportions.

Use the reference recipe JSON below for pose, composition, camera, outfit vibe, background, and lighting.

Do not copy the reference person's identity. The identity must stay as the character in image 1.

reference recipe:
{
  "composition": {
    "orientation": "vertical portrait smartphone selfie",
    "framing": "tight full-body-to-three-quarter selfie framing from above, with the subject filling most of the frame diagonally",
    "subject_position": "subject centered slightly left, body running from lower left to upper center, extended camera arm dominating the right foreground",
    "crop": "top of head near upper edge; feet visible near bottom; right arm partially cropped by the frame edge",
    "depth_of_field": "deep focus with subject and nearby background clearly visible",
    "background_perspective": "steep downward perspective showing wall corner, floor, and partial door from above"
  },
  "camera": {
    "shot_type": "high-angle mirrorless/selfie-style portrait",
    "camera_angle": "very high angle looking down from above the subject’s face and shoulder",
    "camera_distance": "close handheld arm’s-length distance",
    "lens_feel": "wide-angle smartphone lens with slight perspective distortion, especially on the extended arm",
    "capture_device": "front-facing smartphone camera or handheld phone",
    "image_texture": "clean digital UGC texture, sharp detail, minimal grain, natural phone processing"
  },
  "pose": {
    "body_orientation": "standing with body turned slightly sideways, hips angled toward the lower left of frame",
    "torso_position": "torso elongated and subtly arched, shoulders angled diagonally toward camera",
    "head_position": "head tilted upward toward the camera with chin slightly raised",
    "arm_position": "one arm extended upward/outward holding the camera; opposite arm bent with hand placed behind or near the back of the head",
    "hand_position": "camera hand out of frame; other hand hidden behind head/neck area",
    "leg_position": "legs close together with one knee subtly bent; feet positioned near the bottom of frame",
    "gaze_direction": "direct eye contact with the camera lens"
  },
  "facial_expression": {
    "eyes": "open, alert eyes looking directly up at camera",
    "mouth": "lips softly parted with relaxed glossed appearance",
    "overall_expression": "neutral to subtly pouty selfie expression, calm and composed"
  },
  "hair": {
    "length": "long",
    "color": "blonde with slightly darker roots",
    "texture": "smooth, pulled back with braided length",
    "parting": "soft center/front part with face-framing strands",
    "placement": "hair pulled into a braid falling over one shoulder/side, with loose strands framing the face",
    "hair_accessories": []
  },
  "clothing": {
    "top": {
      "type": "long-sleeve fitted mini dress or one-piece bodycon outfit",
      "color": "black",
      "fit": "very fitted, body-hugging",
      "details": "ribbed fabric texture, crew neckline, long sleeves"
    },
    "outerwear": {
      "type": "none",
      "color": "none",
      "fit": "none",
      "details": "no outer layer visible"
    },
    "bottom": {
      "type": "integrated short mini dress hem",
      "color": "black",
      "fit": "bodycon fitted",
      "details": "short hemline, continuous ribbed material matching top"
    },
    "footwear": {
      "type": "sneakers",
      "color": "white/off-white",
      "fit": "athletic casual",
      "details": "chunky low-top sneakers worn with white crew socks"
    }
  },
  "accessories": {
    "jewelry": [
      "small hoop earring"
    ],
    "face_accessories": [],
    "handheld_items": [
      "smartphone used for selfie, mostly out of frame"
    ],
    "other": [
      "white wireless earbud in one ear"
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "location_type": "indoor entryway or utility/back-door area",
    "setting": "simple interior corner with painted wall and concrete floor",
    "background_elements": [
      "white vertical paneling on upper wall",
      "dark gray painted brick or block wall on lower section",
      "white door partially visible on right",
      "stained concrete floor"
    ],
    "ground_surface": "raw or stained concrete floor",
    "weather": "not visible, indoor setting",
    "time_of_day": "indeterminate, likely daytime or bright indoor lighting",
    "props": [
      "door hinge/door edge",
      "base trim or wall ledge"
    ]
  },
  "lighting": {
    "main_light_source": "soft overhead or front-facing ambient indoor light",
    "secondary_light_sources": [
      "possible reflected light from white door and wall panels"
    ],
    "direction": "light falls evenly from above/front, illuminating face and outfit",
    "intensity": "moderate to bright",
    "color_temperature": "neutral to slightly cool indoor white",
    "shadow_quality": "soft shadows with minimal harsh contrast",
    "reflections": "subtle highlights on glossy lips, earbud, and white shoes"
  },
  "recreation_notes": {
    "must_preserve": [
      "vertical high-angle smartphone selfie composition",
      "direct gaze upward at camera",
      "one arm extended toward camera with strong foreground perspective",
      "opposite arm bent behind head",
      "black ribbed long-sleeve fitted mini dress silhouette",
      "white sneakers and socks",
      "indoor corner with gray lower wall, white upper paneling, concrete floor, and partial door",
      "soft neutral indoor lighting"
    ],
    "can_change": [
      "character identity, facial features, ethnicity, and exact body type",
      "exact hairstyle color or braid details while keeping pulled-back sporty styling",
      "minor wall texture and floor stain patterns",
      "specific jewelry style"
    ],
    "avoid": [
      "identifying or matching the original person",
      "studio-polished editorial lighting",
      "wide environmental framing that loses selfie intimacy",
      "dramatic filters or heavy retouching",
      "different camera angle such as eye-level or low-angle"
    ]
  }
}

composition.framing: tight full-body-to-three-quarter selfie framing from above, with the subject filling most of the frame diagonally
composition.subject_position: subject centered slightly left, body running from lower left to upper center, extended camera arm dominating the right foreground

pose.body_orientation: standing with body turned slightly sideways, hips angled toward the lower left of frame
pose.torso_position: torso elongated and subtly arched, shoulders angled diagonally toward camera
pose.head_position: head tilted upward toward the camera with chin slightly raised
pose.arm_position: one arm extended upward/outward holding the camera; opposite arm bent with hand placed behind or near the back of the head
pose.hand_position: camera hand out of frame; other hand hidden behind head/neck area
pose.leg_position: legs close together with one knee subtly bent; feet positioned near the bottom of frame
pose.gaze_direction: direct eye contact with the camera lens

facial_expression.mouth: lips softly parted with relaxed glossed appearance
facial_expression.overall_expression: neutral to subtly pouty selfie expression, calm and composed

hair.parting: soft center/front part with face-framing strands
hair.placement: hair pulled into a braid falling over one shoulder/side, with loose strands framing the face

top.details: ribbed fabric texture, crew neckline, long sleeves

bottom.details: short hemline, continuous ribbed material matching top

footwear.details: chunky low-top sneakers worn with white crew socks

handheld_items: smartphone used for selfie, mostly out of frame

environment.setting: simple interior corner with painted wall and concrete floor

dark gray painted brick or block wall on lower section
white door partially visible on right
environment.time_of_day: indeterminate, likely daytime or bright indoor lighting

lighting.main_light_source: soft overhead or front-facing ambient indoor light
secondary_light_sources: possible reflected light from white door and wall panels
lighting.direction: light falls evenly from above/front, illuminating face and outfit
lighting.color_temperature: neutral to slightly cool indoor white
lighting.shadow_quality: soft shadows with minimal harsh contrast
lighting.reflections: subtle highlights on glossy lips, earbud, and white shoes

must_preserve: one arm extended toward camera with strong foreground perspective
black ribbed long-sleeve fitted mini dress silhouette
indoor corner with gray lower wall, white upper paneling, concrete floor, and partial door
can_change: character identity, facial features, ethnicity, and exact body type
exact hairstyle color or braid details while keeping pulled-back sporty styling
minor wall texture and floor stain patterns
avoid: identifying or matching the original person
wide environmental framing that loses selfie intimacy
different camera angle such as eye-level or low-angle

      "identifying or matching the original person",
      "studio-polished editorial lighting",
      "wide environmental framing that loses selfie intimacy",
      "dramatic filters or heavy retouching",
      "different camera angle such as eye-level or low-angle"
    ]
  }
}

composition.framing: tight full-body-to-three-quarter selfie framing from above, with the subject filling most of the frame diagonally
composition.subject_position: subject centered slightly left, body running from lower left to upper center, extended camera arm dominating the right foreground
composition.crop: top of head near upper edge; feet visible near bottom; right arm partially cropped by the frame edge
composition.depth_of_field: deep focus with subject and nearby background clearly visible
composition.background_perspective: steep downward perspective showing wall corner, floor, and partial door from above

camera.camera_angle: very high angle looking down from above the subject’s face and shoulder
camera.lens_feel: wide-angle smartphone lens with slight perspective distortion, especially on the extended arm
camera.capture_device: front-facing smartphone camera or handheld phone
camera.image_texture: clean digital UGC texture, sharp detail, minimal grain, natural phone processing

pose.body_orientation: standing with body turned slightly sideways, hips angled toward the lower left of frame
pose.torso_position: torso elongated and subtly arched, shoulders angled diagonally toward camera
pose.head_position: head tilted upward toward the camera with chin slightly raised
pose.arm_position: one arm extended upward/outward holding the camera; opposite arm bent with hand placed behind or near the back of the head
pose.hand_position: camera hand out of frame; other hand hidden behind head/neck area
pose.leg_position: legs close together with one knee subtly bent; feet positioned near the bottom of frame
pose.gaze_direction: direct eye contact with the camera lens

facial_expression.eyes: open, alert eyes looking directly up at camera
facial_expression.mouth: lips softly parted with relaxed glossed appearance
facial_expression.overall_expression: neutral to subtly pouty selfie expression, calm and composed

hair.texture: smooth, pulled back with braided length
hair.parting: soft center/front part with face-framing strands
hair.placement: hair pulled into a braid falling over one shoulder/side, with loose strands framing the face

top.type: long-sleeve fitted mini dress or one-piece bodycon outfit
top.details: ribbed fabric texture, crew neckline, long sleeves

bottom.details: short hemline, continuous ribbed material matching top

footwear.details: chunky low-top sneakers worn with white crew socks

handheld_items: smartphone used for selfie, mostly out of frame
other: white wireless earbud in one ear

environment.setting: simple interior corner with painted wall and concrete floor
background_elements: white vertical paneling on upper wall
dark gray painted brick or block wall on lower section
white door partially visible on right
environment.time_of_day: indeterminate, likely daytime or bright indoor lighting

lighting.main_light_source: soft overhead or front-facing ambient indoor light
secondary_light_sources: possible reflected light from white door and wall panels
lighting.direction: light falls evenly from above/front, illuminating face and outfit
lighting.color_temperature: neutral to slightly cool indoor white
lighting.shadow_quality: soft shadows with minimal harsh contrast
lighting.reflections: subtle highlights on glossy lips, earbud, and white shoes

must_preserve: one arm extended toward camera with strong foreground perspective
black ribbed long-sleeve fitted mini dress silhouette
indoor corner with gray lower wall, white upper paneling, concrete floor, and partial door
can_change: character identity, facial features, ethnicity, and exact body type
exact hairstyle color or braid details while keeping pulled-back sporty styling
minor wall texture and floor stain patterns
avoid: identifying or matching the original person
wide environmental framing that loses selfie intimacy
different camera angle such as eye-level or low-angle
